description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has full cuff sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, tipped collar with a buttoned chest placket, two buttoned flap pockets on the chest, two short shoulder flaps and has a curved hemFittingComfort Wash careMachine wash using a mild detergent at 30 degreesDo not bleachTumble dry or dry in shadeWarm iron An ever-favourite colour that's here to stay forever, this white shirt from spykar is a must-have in every man's wardrobe. Created using soft cotton and designed for an absolutely casual look, it's a fabulous weekend wear. Pair this shirt with jeans or chinos and suede shoes. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6'; Shoulders: 18"
